name: Uptown Potato Skins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sour cream or creme fraiche
Crisp crumbled bacon and minced scallions
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Pierce each potato with a fork and bake until tender, about 40 minutes. Let cool.
2. Halve potatoes. Cut a thin slice from the rounded bottom of each potato half so it will stand upright. Using a melon baller or a small spoon, scoop out the center from each potato half, leaving a shell about 1/4 inch thick; reserve the scooped-out potato for another use.
3. In a wok or large heavy saucepan, heat oil to 360 degrees on a deep-fry thermometer. Cook potato shells in batches without crowding, until just golden, 1 to 2 minutes. Drain on paper towels. (If made in advance, cover and refrigerate as long as 24 hours.)
4. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Using a small spoon or a pastry ball fitted with a star, fill each potato cavity with 2 teaspoons sour cream. Arrange on a baking sheet and cook until heated through, about 10 minutes. Top with desired toppings and serve warm.
